release_notes: v1.7.0+19: Introduced Smart Scan Intimation Popover with seamless vector pointers, session-based scheduling, German localizations, and performance optimizations.
features: Smart Scan Intimation Popover below Scan button for quick app updates.
Seamless single-path vector popover bubble with dynamic sub-pixel button alignment.
Smart session scheduling: intimates on 2nd, 4th, and 8th app launches.
fixes: Isolated popover animations with RepaintBoundary for smooth 60+ FPS on low-power devices.
Synchronized multi-language localizations across all supported locales.
